name: HWR_GOAL_ACTIVITY_VL
query: SELECT ACTIVITY.USER_ID, ACTIVITY.ACTIVITY_ID, ACTIVITY.VALUE, ACTIVITY.UNITS, GOAL.GOAL_ID, ACTIVITY.URI, GOAL.GOAL_METRIC, 'DISTANCE' MEASURE_TYPE, ACTIVITY.STOP_TIME FROM ( SELECT AA.ACTIVITY_ID, AA.URI, AA.USER_ID, AA.START_TIME, AA.STOP_TIME, AMD.VALUE, AMD.UNITS FROM HWR_ACT_ACTIVITY AA, HWR_ACT_MSR_DISTANCE AMD WHERE AA.ACTIVITY_ID = AMD.ACTIVITY_ID AND AA.URI = 'oracle:apps:hcm:hwr:cardea:activity:summary' ) ACTIVITY, ( SELECT GF.GOAL_ID, GUX.USER_ID, GF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, GF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, GF.GOAL_METRIC FROM HWR_GOAL_F GF, HWR_GOAL_USER_XREF GUX WHERE GF.GOAL_ID = GUX.GOAL_ID AND GF.CATEGORY = 'oracle:apps:hcm:hwr:cardea:goalcategory:Personal' AND GF.GOAL_METRIC = 'oracle:apps:hcm:hwr:cardea:activity:running' ) GOAL WHERE ACTIVITY.USER_ID = GOAL.USER_ID AND TRUNC(ACTIVITY.START_TIME) >= TRUNC(GOAL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE) AND TRUNC(ACTIVITY.STOP_TIME) <= TRUNC(GOAL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) AND ACTIVITY.VALUE > 0 UNION SELECT ACTIVITY.USER_ID, ACTIVITY.ACTIVITY_ID, ACTIVITY.VALUE, ACTIVITY.UNITS, GOAL.GOAL_ID, ACTIVITY.URI, GOAL.GOAL_METRIC, 'STEPS' MEASURE_TYPE, ACTIVITY.STOP_TIME FROM ( SELECT AA.ACTIVITY_ID, AA.URI, AA.USER_ID, AA.START_TIME, AA.STOP_TIME, AMS.VALUE, AMS.UNITS FROM HWR_ACT_ACTIVITY AA, HWR_ACT_MSR_STEPS AMS WHERE AA.ACTIVITY_ID = AMS.ACTIVITY_ID AND AA.URI = 'oracle:apps:hcm:hwr:cardea:activity:summary' ) ACTIVITY, ( SELECT GF.GOAL_ID, GUX.USER_ID, GF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, GF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, GF.GOAL_METRIC FROM HWR_GOAL_F GF, HWR_GOAL_USER_XREF GUX WHERE GF.GOAL_ID = GUX.GOAL_ID AND GF.CATEGORY = 'oracle:apps:hcm:hwr:cardea:goalcategory:Personal' AND GF.GOAL_METRIC = 'oracle:apps:hcm:hwr:cardea:activitymeasure:steps' ) GOAL WHERE ACTIVITY.USER_ID = GOAL.USER_ID AND TRUNC(ACTIVITY.START_TIME) >= TRUNC(GOAL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE) AND TRUNC(ACTIVITY.STOP_TIME) <= TRUNC(GOAL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) AND ACTIVITY.VALUE > 0 UNION SELECT ACTIVITY.USER_ID, ACTIVITY.ACTIVITY_ID, ACTIVITY.VALUE, ACTIVITY.UNITS, GOAL.GOAL_ID, ACTIVITY.URI, GOAL.GOAL_METRIC, 'ACTIVE' MEASURE_TYPE, ACTIVITY.STOP_TIME FROM ( SELECT AA.ACTIVITY_ID, AA.URI, AA.USER_ID, AA.START_TIME, AA.STOP_TIME, AMA.VALUE, AMA.UNITS FROM HWR_ACT_ACTIVITY AA, HWR_ACT_MSR_ACTIVE AMA WHERE AA.ACTIVITY_ID = AMA.ACTIVITY_ID AND AA.URI = 'oracle:apps:hcm:hwr:cardea:activity:summary' ) ACTIVITY, ( SELECT GF.GOAL_ID, GUX.USER_ID, GF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, GF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, GF.GOAL_METRIC FROM HWR_GOAL_F GF, HWR_GOAL_USER_XREF GUX WHERE GF.GOAL_ID = GUX.GOAL_ID AND GF.CATEGORY = 'oracle:apps:hcm:hwr:cardea:goalcategory:Personal' AND GF.GOAL_METRIC = 'oracle:apps:hcm:hwr:cardea:activitymeasure:high_activity_time' ) GOAL WHERE ACTIVITY.USER_ID = GOAL.USER_ID AND TRUNC(ACTIVITY.START_TIME) >= TRUNC(GOAL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE) AND TRUNC(ACTIVITY.STOP_TIME) <= TRUNC(GOAL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE) AND ACTIVITY.VALUE > 0
